thinkprint.tagline: Extract your logic structure into a Thinkprint mode you can play with, remix, and refine.
thinkprint.description: Thinkprint is a fun but powerful playground. Instead of cloning your memory, it captures how you reason.

status.label: Status
status.note: v0.4 whitepaper published. Extraction pipeline functional.

items.toy: A playful logic-structure extractor for building Thinkprint modes
items.reflection: A self-reflection playground, not a memory-reconstruction product
items.declaration: Thinkprint mode = editable reasoning profile, not fixed personality labeling

items.alignment: Not an AI alignment control system

pipeline.title: Playground Pipeline
pipeline.description: Four lightweight steps from conversation to remixable Thinkprint artifacts.

extract.title: Extract
extract.description: Conversation-based extraction. Draft your reasoning structure from dialogue signals.

calibrate.title: Calibrate
calibrate.description: Quick calibration prompts refine thresholds, preferences, and decision style.

deepen.title: Deepen
deepen.description: Interactive deepening on contradictions, delegation boundaries, and reasoning tradeoffs.

freeze.title: Freeze
freeze.description: Freeze a versioned snapshot you can reuse, compare, fork, and evolve.

output.title: Output Structure
output.description: Each Thinkprint version outputs three practical, remix-friendly artifacts.

declaration.title: thinkprint.md
declaration.description: Reasoning principles, delegation policy, risk boundaries, and update triggers.

prompt.title: agent_system_prompt.txt
prompt.description: Executable reasoning policy for agents. Fast to test and iterate.

metadata.title: metadata.json
metadata.description: Versioning, extraction method, confidence, and optional JDVP links.

connection.title: Connection to BufferLine
connection.description: JDVP tracks where judgment moves. Thinkprint captures your logic structure. Together, they make experimentation measurable.
connection.future: Future: JDVP telemetry feeds into Thinkprint drift tracking
